title: Courtroom Testimony
text:
## Courtroom Testimony

Your honor, on {day of week}, I saw {person} enter the {place} carrying a {adjective} {object}.

The witness appeared {emotion} and began {verb ending in -ing} near the evidence table.

When asked about the missing {noun}, they {past-tense verb} and blamed a {animal} wearing a {color} {clothing item}.

Exhibit {number} is a bag of {plural noun} found beside the {body part} print.

I swear this statement is completely {adjective} and only slightly {emotion}, according to the {job}.
